member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Shared.ObjectDataHelpers
member.summary: Shared helpers for projecting object data into tabular structures.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Shared.ObjectDataHelpers.GetColumnNames(System.Object)
member.summary: Resolves column names from a dictionary or public readable properties.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Shared.ObjectDataHelpers.GetValue(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a value for the specified column from a dictionary or property.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Shared.NonDisposingMemoryStream
member.summary: MemoryStream that suppresses disposal so OpenXml packages can close without losing the buffer.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor
member.summary: Small immutable RGBA color value used by OfficeIMO packages without external image dependencies.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor.#ctor(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: Creates an RGBA color.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor.R
member.summary: Red component.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor.G
member.summary: Green component.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor.B
member.summary: Blue component.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor.A
member.summary: Alpha component.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor.FromRgb(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: Creates an opaque color from RGB components.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor.FromRgba(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: Creates a color from RGBA components.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a named color, #RRGGBB, RRGGBB, #RRGGBBAA, or RRGGBBAA.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor.ParseHex(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a hexadecimal color value.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor.TryParse(System.String,OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor@)
member.summary: Tries to parse a named or hexadecimal color value.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor.TryParseHex(System.String,OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor@)
member.summary: Tries to parse a hexadecimal color value.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor.ToHex
member.summary: Returns RRGGBBAA.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor.ToRgbHex
member.summary: Returns RRGGBB.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor.ToArgbHex
member.summary: Returns AARRGGBB.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor.op_Equality(OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor,OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor)
member.summary: Equality operator.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor.op_Inequality(OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor,OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor)
member.summary: Inequality operator.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColorExtensions
member.summary: Convenience color conversion helpers shared by OfficeIMO packages.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColorExtensions.ToHexColor(OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeColor)
member.summary: Converts a color to a hexadecimal RRGGBB value.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo
member.summary: Small immutable font descriptor used by OfficeIMO packages without taking a dependency on a font engine.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.Double,OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontStyle)
member.summary: Creates a font descriptor.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo.FamilyName
member.summary: Font family name, when known.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo.Size
member.summary: Font size in points.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo.Style
member.summary: Font style flags.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo.IsBold
member.summary: Whether the descriptor includes bold styling.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo.IsItalic
member.summary: Whether the descriptor includes italic styling.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo.IsUnderline
member.summary: Whether the descriptor includes underline styling.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo.Default
member.summary: Default Office font descriptor.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo.WithFamilyName(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a copy with a different family name.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo.WithSize(System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a copy with a different point size.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo.WithStyle(OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontStyle)
member.summary: Creates a copy with different style flags.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo.op_Equality(OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo,OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo)
member.summary: Equality operator.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo.op_Inequality(OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo,OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo)
member.summary: Inequality operator.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontStyle
member.summary: Describes text style flags without depending on a rendering or font library.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontStyle.Regular
member.summary: Regular text.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontStyle.Bold
member.summary: Bold text.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontStyle.Italic
member.summary: Italic text.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontStyle.Underline
member.summary: Underlined text.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageFormat
member.summary: Image formats understood by the shared OfficeIMO drawing layer.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageFormat.Unknown
member.summary: Unknown or unsupported image format.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageFormat.Png
member.summary: Portable Network Graphics image.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageFormat.Jpeg
member.summary: JPEG image.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageFormat.Gif
member.summary: Graphics Interchange Format image.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageFormat.Bmp
member.summary: Bitmap image.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageFormat.Tiff
member.summary: Tagged Image File Format image.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageFormat.Svg
member.summary: Scalable Vector Graphics image.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageFormat.Emf
member.summary: Enhanced Metafile image.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageFormat.Wmf
member.summary: Windows Metafile image.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageFormat.Icon
member.summary: Icon image.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageFormat.Pcx
member.summary: PCX image.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageInfo
member.summary: Header-level image metadata used by Office Open XML packages.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageInfo.#ctor(OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageFormat,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a new image metadata value.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageInfo.Format
member.summary: Image format.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageInfo.Width
member.summary: Width in pixels, or 0 when unknown.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageInfo.Height
member.summary: Height in pixels, or 0 when unknown.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageInfo.DpiX
member.summary: Horizontal resolution in DPI. Defaults to 96 when absent.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageInfo.DpiY
member.summary: Vertical resolution in DPI. Defaults to 96 when absent.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageInfo.MimeType
member.summary: Default MIME type for the detected format.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageReader
member.summary: Header-only image metadata reader used to avoid full image decoding dependencies.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageReader.Identify(System.String)
member.summary: Identifies image metadata from a file.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageReader.Identify(System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Identifies image metadata from a byte array.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageReader.TryIdentify(System.IO.Stream,System.String,OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageInfo@)
member.summary: Tries to identify image metadata from a stream.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageReader.TryIdentify(System.Byte[],System.String,OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageInfo@)
member.summary: Tries to identify image metadata from a byte array.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeImageReader.FromExtension(System.String)
member.summary: Maps a file name or extension to a supported image format.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurementStyle
member.summary: Normalized font and DPI data used by .

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurementStyle.FontInfo
member.summary: Normalized font descriptor used for this measurement style.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurementStyle.Dpi
member.summary: Measurement DPI.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurementStyle.FontSizePixels
member.summary: Font size converted to pixels for the selected DPI.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurementStyle.SpaceWidthPixels
member.summary: Estimated width of a space character in pixels.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurementStyle.MaximumDigitWidthPixels
member.summary: Estimated maximum digit width in pixels.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurer
member.summary: Deterministic, zero-dependency text measurer for Office layout estimates.
member.remarks: This measurer intentionally does not call operating-system font APIs. It provides stable Office-oriented estimates for layout decisions such as autofit and wrapping.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurer.DefaultDpi
member.summary: Default measurement DPI.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurer.DefaultStyle
member.summary: Default style derived from the fallback font.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurer.DefaultFontSize
member.summary: Default font size in points.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurer.FallbackFontInfo
member.summary: Fallback font descriptor used when no explicit font is available.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurer.Create(System.Nullable{OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo})
member.summary: Creates a deterministic text measurer.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurer.CreateDefaultStyle(System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a style from the measurer fallback font and a DPI value.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurer.CreateStyle(OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo)
member.summary: Creates a style from a font descriptor using the default DPI.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurer.CreateStyle(OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeFontInfo,System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a style from a font descriptor and DPI value.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurer.Measure(System.String,OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurementStyle)
member.summary: Measures text width and line metrics for the supplied style.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurer.MeasureWidth(System.String,OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurementStyle)
member.summary: Measures text width in pixels for the supplied style.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurer.MeasureWidthOrDefault(System.String,OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurementStyle,System.Double)
member.summary: Measures text width or returns the provided fallback when text cannot be measured.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurer.MeasureLineHeight(OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurementStyle)
member.summary: Measures a single-line text height in pixels for the supplied style.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurer.MeasureLineHeightOrDefault(System.String,OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMeasurementStyle,System.Double)
member.summary: Measures line height or returns the provided fallback when text is empty.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMetrics
member.summary: Deterministic text measurement result in pixels.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMetrics.WidthPixels
member.summary: Estimated text width in pixels.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMetrics.LineHeightPixels
member.summary: Estimated single-line height in pixels.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMetrics.SpaceWidthPixels
member.summary: Estimated width of a space character in pixels.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Drawing.OfficeTextMetrics.MaximumDigitWidthPixels
member.summary: Estimated maximum digit width in pixels.
